/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/log_analyzer.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/log_analyzer.dir/src/HashUtils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/log_analyzer.dir/src/BloomFilter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/log_analyzer.dir/src/CountMinSketch.cpp.o CMakeFiles/log_analyzer.dir/src/HyperLogLog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/log_analyzer.dir/src/SpaceSaving.cpp.o CMakeFiles/log_analyzer.dir/src/DatabaseManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/log_analyzer.dir/src/LogReceiver.cpp.o -o log_analyzer  -lsqlite3 -lpthread
